summary: No architecture/spec regression risk found for DIJ-CONTRACT-012, DIJ-SCENARIO-008, or the repo status responsibility-authority additions at current HEAD.

inspection.summary: Reviewed the requested regression_risk input and reused current-head evidence. The phase split remains additive: diagnostic evidence builds code_quality before phase-specific judgment fields are attached, so authorization_order_risks are preserved for both design-input and pre-implementation phases. Repo status responsibility-authority is registered as guidance only, bound to src/repo-status.js/buildNextCommands, and covered by current-head unit/typecheck evidence.

judgment_delta: Initial regression concern was that the architecture_spec phase split could drop legacy authorization_order_risks or that repo status guidance could bypass workflow gates. Current-head inspection changed judgment to pass because the risk signal is preserved before phase branching and VIBE-CORE-STATUS-001 is constrained to rendered guidance with current-head unit/typecheck evidence.
